name: Peanut Butter-Granola Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the butter, brown sugar, eggs, and water until smooth.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture into the butter mixture, stirring until combined.
5. Stir in the natural cereal and peanut butter morsels.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes.
